_comment: Central config for the /council skill. launch.sh reads chief_model; council.sh reads councilors[]. Each councilor name must be a shell function defined in ~/.local/bin/council-def.sh (which holds that backend's base_url / model / token). If this file is missing/unreadable or a key is absent, the scripts fall back to built-in defaults (chief_model=Opus, councilors=glm/ds/kimi).
